settings.heading: Contact Render-Lab
settings.intro: Questions about an order, damaged shipment, custom request, or collector release? Send a message below and include your order number if you have one.
settings.order_text: Include your order number and the email used at checkout so support can find the purchase quickly.
settings.damage_text: If an item arrives damaged, keep the packaging and include photos when replying to the support email.
settings.collab_text: For collaborations, custom requests, or collector release questions, share the project details and timeline.
